# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install basic utilities
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    apt-utils \
    software-properties-common \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    vim \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python and pip
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set the default Python version
RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3 1

# Clean up
RUN apt-get clean

# Work directory
WORKDIR /app

# Add application code
COPY . /app

# Install Python dependencies
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Command to run the application
CMD ["python", "your_script.py"]
